text: Wina'am da nyɛ on maal si'el la wʋsa ka li an sʋm. Ka yʋ'ʋŋ sɔb ka bɛog nie daba ayuobʋ daare la.
translated: We will not finish the work today. If you come early tomorrow, we can finish it.

ref: Zibeon's sons were Aiah and Anah—the same Anah who found an oasis in the desert while taking the donkeys of his father out to pasture.
text: Zibeon biribis da anɛ: Aya nɛ Ana. Ana kaŋa da bɛ sian'arin kemmi o saam Zibeon bʋmis ka nyɛ ka ku'otʋʋlʋg tans teŋin yit na la.
translated: Zibeon told us: Aya and Ana. Ana said that they would go to the farm today, but Zibeon could not go because of the rain later at night.
